description: 描述住所类型的标准开头。a flat / a house / a dorm。
examples_json: [{"en":"I live in a comfortable flat near the city center.","zh":"我住在市中心附近一个舒适的公寓里。"}]

description: 描述最喜欢的房间。bedroom / living room / bathroom。
examples_json: [{"en":"My favorite room is my bedroom because it's cozy.","zh":"我最喜欢的房间是我的卧室，因为它很舒适。"}]

text: What I like most about my home is...
meaning: 我最喜欢我家的一点是...
description: 描述家最吸引你的地方。the view / the location / the atmosphere。
examples_json: [{"en":"What I like most about my home is the big window with a nice view.","zh":"我最喜欢我家的一点是能看到美景的大窗户。"}]

description: 描述家乡类型的开头。small city / big town / coastal city。
examples_json: [{"en":"My hometown is a small city in southern China.","zh":"我的家乡是中国南部的一个小城市。"}]

description: 描述家乡特色。famous for its food / scenery / culture。
examples_json: [{"en":"It's famous for its local cuisine and friendly people.","zh":"它以当地美食和友善的人们闻名。"}]

text: One thing I like about my hometown is...
description: 表达对家乡的正面感受。the pace of life / the community / the food。
examples_json: [{"en":"One thing I like about my hometown is the slow pace of life.","zh":"我喜欢家乡的一点是慢节奏的生活。"}]

description: 描述学习的地点和专业。
examples_json: [{"en":"I'm studying Business Administration at Beijing University.","zh":"我在北京大学学习工商管理。"}]

description: 描述职业。a teacher / an engineer / a designer。
examples_json: [{"en":"I work as a software engineer at a tech company.","zh":"我是一家科技公司的软件工程师。"}]

description: 解释选择的原因。表达动机。
examples_json: [{"en":"I chose this major because I've always been interested in technology.","zh":"我选择这个专业是因为我一直对科技感兴趣。"}]

text: In my free time I like to...
description: 描述业余爱好的标准句型。
examples_json: [{"en":"In my free time, I like to read and take photos.","zh":"空闲时我喜欢阅读和拍照。"}]

text: I got into... when I was...
description: 描述爱好如何开始。I got into photography when I was in high school。
examples_json: [{"en":"I got into photography when I was 15.","zh":"我从15岁开始喜欢摄影。"}]

text: It helps me relax after a long day.
meaning: 它帮助我在一天劳累后放松。
description: 描述爱好带来的好处。relax / unwind / de-stress。
examples_json: [{"en":"Playing the guitar helps me relax after a long day at work.","zh":"弹吉他能帮我在工作一天后放松。"}]

text: The place I'd like to recommend is...
description: P2独白开场句。描述推荐的地点。
examples_json: [{"en":"The place I'd like to recommend is a small town in Yunnan.","zh":"我想推荐的地方是云南的一个小镇。"}]

description: 描述地点位置。located in / situated in / near。
examples_json: [{"en":"It's located in the mountains of central Japan.","zh":"它位于日本中部的山区。"}]

description: 描述在那里可以做什么。列举活动。
examples_json: [{"en":"You can go hiking, enjoy local food, and visit ancient temples there.","zh":"在那里你可以徒步、品尝当地美食、参观古寺。"}]

description: 说明推荐理由。
examples_json: [{"en":"I would recommend it because the scenery is absolutely breathtaking.","zh":"我推荐它因为那里的景色令人叹为观止。"}]

text: The area I really enjoy is...
meaning: 我真的很喜欢的地方是...
description: P2独白开场句。描述喜欢的城市角落。
examples_json: [{"en":"The area I really enjoy is the old town district.","zh":"我真的很喜欢的地方是老城区。"}]

description: 突出地点独特之处。its atmosphere / the architecture / the people。
examples_json: [{"en":"What makes it special is the vibrant street art scene.","zh":"让它特别的是充满活力的街头艺术。"}]

description: 描述在那里常做的事情。relax / hang out / study。
examples_json: [{"en":"I usually go there to meet friends and have coffee.","zh":"我通常去那里见朋友喝咖啡。"}]

description: 描述去过的地方。后接场馆名称。
examples_json: [{"en":"I've been to the National Stadium several times.","zh":"我去过国家体育馆好几次。"}]

description: 描述场馆容量。holds / accommodates / seats。
examples_json: [{"en":"It can hold up to 80,000 spectators.","zh":"它能容纳多达8万名观众。"}]

description: 描述现场感受。incredible / electric / amazing。
examples_json: [{"en":"The atmosphere during the match was incredible.","zh":"比赛期间的气氛非常棒。"}]

text: A new shop has recently opened...
description: 描述新店。recently opened / just opened。
examples_json: [{"en":"A new shop has recently opened near my house.","zh":"我家附近新开了一家店。"}]

description: 描述商店主营业务。specializes in / sells / offers。
examples_json: [{"en":"It specializes in organic and locally sourced produce.","zh":"它专营有机和本地食材。"}]

text: I think it will be successful because...
description: 预测商店前景。表达观点。
examples_json: [{"en":"I think it will be successful because there's a growing demand for healthy food.","zh":"我觉得它会成功，因为对健康食品的需求在增长。"}]

text: Tourism brings both benefits and drawbacks.
meaning: 旅游既有好处也有坏处。
description: P3讨论辩证开场句。benefits and drawbacks / pros and cons。
examples_json: [{"en":"Tourism brings both economic benefits and environmental drawbacks.","zh":"旅游既带来经济效益也带来环境问题。"}]

description: 提出解决方案。
examples_json: [{"en":"One solution is to limit the number of daily visitors.","zh":"一个解决方案是限制每日游客数量。"}]

description: 表达建议。government should invest / regulate / promote。
examples_json: [{"en":"The government should invest more in sustainable tourism.","zh":"政府应该加大对可持续旅游的投入。"}]

text: Technology has changed the way we...
meaning: 科技改变了我们...的方式
description: P3论述开场句。communicate / work / shop / learn。
examples_json: [{"en":"Technology has changed the way we communicate with each other.","zh":"科技改变了我们相互沟通的方式。"}]

text: On the one hand... on the other hand...
description: P3常见对比论证结构。
examples_json: [{"en":"On the one hand, technology makes life more convenient. On the other hand, it can be addictive.","zh":"一方面科技让生活更便利，另一方面它也可能让人上瘾。"}]

description: P3讨论未来趋势。
examples_json: [{"en":"In the future, AI will play an even bigger role in our daily lives.","zh":"将来，AI会在我们的日常生活中扮演更大的角色。"}]

difficulty: 选择职业时人们会考虑...
description: L3
examples_json: P3论述开场句。salary / passion / work-life balance。
column9: [{"en":"When choosing a career, people consider salary, passion, and job stability.","zh":"选择职业时，人们会考虑薪资、热情和工作稳定性。"}]

description: 表示没有标准答案的委婉表达。
examples_json: [{"en":"Whether job satisfaction or salary matters more depends on the individual.","zh":"工作满意度还是薪资更重要因人而异。"}]

description: P3常用举例表达。
examples_json: [{"en":"In my country, more people are choosing to work remotely.","zh":"在我的国家，越来越多的人选择远程工作。"}]

description: 描述教育方式。focuses on / emphasizes / prioritizes。
examples_json: [{"en":"Traditional education focuses on memorization and exams.","zh":"传统教育注重记忆和考试。"}]

description: P3讨论优劣势。
examples_json: [{"en":"The advantage of online learning is that it's flexible.","zh":"在线学习的优势是灵活。"}]

description: 表达个人观点。IELTS Part 3常用。
examples_json: [{"en":"I believe that learning should be a lifelong process.","zh":"我认为学习应该是一个终身的过程。"}]
